moves.title: Compose named predicates before adding new abstractions
moves.trigger: A producer and consumer already agree on a semantic predicate.
moves.action: Add the thinnest top-level theorem with repo-consistent suffixes and derive only elementary side conditions.
moves.anti_pattern: Re-state the scalar inequality as a new hypothesis or invent a duplicate m3_uv_input predicate.
moves.lean_test: The proof body is one producer call, elementary positivity, and one consumer call.

moves.title: Keep geometric and marginal branches distinct
moves.trigger: A scale profile g appears in a 4D Yang–Mills theorem.
moves.action: Inspect whether the assumption is g_k <= C r^k or a marginal recursion; suffix theorem names accordingly.
moves.current_application: Create both _geometric and _marginal wrappers; prefer marginal for the physical 4D route.
moves.anti_pattern: Calling a geometric surrogate the honest 4D coupling theorem.
moves.lean_test: The geometric wrapper exposes r; the marginal wrapper exposes beta and kappa0 > 1.

moves.title: Preserve every support role until its consumer fires
moves.trigger: An adapter mentions locality or factorization.
moves.action: Track spectator, fluctuation, physical active, Omega, skeleton and full target separately.
moves.current_application: Raw-source support bundle and Appendix-F Omega-connectivity.
moves.anti_pattern: One support field reused for connectivity, dependence and exact target union.
moves.lean_test: Each inclusion has a separately named theorem or field.

moves.title: Audit information loss at every scalarization
moves.trigger: Moving from activities or targets to a norm, majorant or scalar remainder.
moves.action: Record target, support, signs, measure, scale and source identity that are forgotten.
moves.current_application: SingleScaleUVDecay forgets Hsharp targets and source construction.
moves.anti_pattern: Using the scalar predicate later to claim physical Hsharp provenance.
moves.lean_test: Every declaration record has a nonempty forgets/caveat audit where appropriate.

moves.title: Move constants outside all physical indices
moves.trigger: A source estimate is said to be uniform.
moves.action: Write exists constants, forall volume cutoff background holes t k; reject the reverse quantifier order.
moves.anti_pattern: A separate convenient constant for every finite volume or scale.
moves.lean_test: #check displays constants before the indexed family hypotheses.

moves.title: Replace opaque Prop placeholders with typed equalities and constructions
moves.trigger: A source package accepts arbitrary Prop parameters.
moves.action: Define facts that mention the actual precision, Hessian, root, activity and coordinate maps.
moves.anti_pattern: Renaming an arbitrary Prop without exposing mathematical data.
moves.lean_test: Every field type changes when the underlying operator/activity changes.

moves.title: Separate definition of an auxiliary remainder from physical identification
moves.trigger: A scalar is defined as an Hsharp sum.
moves.action: Use a definitional scalar to simplify formal plumbing, but keep a second theorem identifying it with the physical covariance remainder.
moves.anti_pattern: Treating rfl for an auxiliary scalar as the physical hR theorem.
moves.lean_test: The physical identification theorem has nontrivial source hypotheses.

moves.title: Prove numerical shell non-vacuity without pretending physical non-vacuity
moves.action: Construct witnesses for numerical constants and explicitly exclude source/activity fields from the claim.
moves.anti_pattern: Claiming a Yang–Mills package exists because real-number inequalities are satisfiable.
moves.lean_test: The theorem conclusion mentions only numerical parameters.

moves.title: Map each source equation to one typed Lean field
moves.action: Create a table source anchor -> mathematical object -> Lean field -> downstream consumer -> uniformity dependencies.
moves.anti_pattern: A single omnibus field named sourceTheorem.
moves.lean_test: Deleting any field breaks a specific downstream projection.

moves.title: Treat oracle and no-sorry checks as part of theorem design
moves.trigger: A new headline theorem or source interface is introduced.
moves.action: Add #print axioms, isolated file compilation, core build, consistency and diff checks in the same commit.
moves.lean_test: Expected axioms are exactly propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound.
